pages.title: Fetish Binding
pages.text: .$(br)Braziers are typically placed within range of an $(l:altar/altar)Altar$(/l), filled with three ingredients and then lit with a $(item)Flint and Steel$() to produce the desired effect either as the Brazier burns, or when it is burnt.
A $(item)Water Bucket$() can be used to extinguish a brazier and clear its current ingredients.
